meta.title: Hypersonic missiles are about more than speed
meta.description:
Hypersonic missiles, or missiles that can travel faster than Mach 5, are considered impossible to defend against... but not just because of their speed. 
#shorts #hypersonicmissile #hypersonic #defense #military #airpower
